title: trachyandra ciliata
intro: Trachyandra ciliata, also known as the yellow wild iris or wild gladiolus, is a plant species in the Asphodelaceae family. It is a perennial plant with yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, treating wounds, and soothing digestive problems. Trachyandra ciliata can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
